project_not_found_deletion: Project not found or deletion failed: {project_id}
missing_interviews_list: Please provide interviews (list of interview items)
no_files_uploaded: Please upload at least one document file
no_documents_processed: No documents were processed successfully. Check file formats.
no_extracted_text: No extracted text found for this project
no_ontology_definition: No ontology definition found for this project
ontology_not_generated_yet: Ontology has not been generated yet. Call /ontology/generate first.
graph_build_already_in_progress: Graph build is already in progress. Add force: true to restart.
graph_build_task_started: Graph build task started. Poll /task/{task_id} for progress.
graph_build_waiting_zep: Waiting for Zep to process data...
no_graph_built: No graph built for this project. Call /api/graph/build first.
simulation_already_running: Simulation is already running. Call /stop first, or use force=true to restart.
simulation_env_not_running: Simulation environment is not running or has been closed. Ensure the simulation has completed and is waiting for commands.
simulation_config_not_found: Simulation config not found. Call /prepare first.
simulation_config_file_not_found: Config file not found. Call /prepare first.
simulation_prepare_already_complete: Preparation already complete — nothing to do
simulation_prepare_task_started: Preparation task started. Poll /api/simulation/prepare/status for progress.
simulation_prepare_status_not_started: Preparation not started. Call /api/simulation/prepare to begin.
simulation_env_alive: Environment is running and ready for interview commands
simulation_env_not_alive: Environment is not running or has been closed
simulation_db_not_exist: Database does not exist; simulation may not have run yet
no_entities_matched: No entities matched the given criteria
max_rounds_must_be_positive: max_rounds must be a positive integer
max_rounds_must_be_integer: max_rounds must be a valid integer
graph_memory_requires_graph_id: Graph memory update requires a valid graph_id. Ensure the project has a built graph.
interview_item_invalid_platform: Interview item {index}: platform must be 'twitter' or 'reddit'
interview_timeout: Timed out waiting for interview response: {error}
interview_batch_timeout: Timed out waiting for batch interview response: {error}
interview_all_timeout: Timed out waiting for global interview response: {error}
report_generate_task_started: Report generation task started. Poll /api/report/generate/status for progress.
report_progress_unavailable: Report not found or progress unavailable: {report_id}
missing_graph_id_for_report: Missing graph ID. Ensure the graph has been built.
interview_prompt_prefix: Based on your persona, all past memories and actions, reply directly in text without calling any tools:
